package_concept: simplified exterior veranda / column corridor / railing combat only, correcting V002 route overload and face instability
route_summary: exterior veranda / column corridor / railing combat only
continuity_source: SHOT-03-V002 failed for choreography and face stability; V003 simplifies to one exterior corridor zone

references.label: @FENSHOU_UPLOADSAFE
references.duty: Fenshou identity only. Black/red armored male warrior, face, hair, armor, silhouette, body type, aggressive forward pressure.

references.label: @SHUANGJI_UPLOADSAFE
references.duty: Highest-priority Shuangji female identity protection only. Female face, female identity, silver-blue high ponytail, blue-silver armor collar/shoulders, white-blue robe panels. Do not use as action/rhythm/scene/camera reference.

references.label: @TEMPLE_SCENE_UPLOADSAFE
references.duty: Rainy ancient temple exterior/veranda world only: frontal main-hall axis, exterior corridor, column line, railing, wet stone floor, exterior eaves, courtyard rain, cold gray-blue rainy mood. Do not use as character identity reference.

requirements: begin outside or semi-outside under the eaves
courtyard, rain, exterior corridor edge, columns, railing, and wet stone floor should be readable
both fighters continue from prior combat continuity
medium or medium-wide framing keeps both characters visible
columns and railing establish the space
stay in exterior veranda / column corridor zone
do not travel to roof tiles or complete a full stair route
one fighter uses a column to break angle or hide direct line
one fighter is forced sideways toward railing
hard brief contact beats: forearm guard collision, palm to shoulder/armor, shoulder check near column, grounded short kick or knee-line pressure
defender reacts with torso displacement, guard buckle, shoulder jolt, foot skid, or forced sidestep
footwork shows wet-floor traction, pivot, slip recovery, and weight transfer

route_timing_design.beat: controlled local architecture reaction and readable endpoint
requirements: end still in exterior veranda / column corridor / railing zone
allow one small controlled breakage event
ending implies later escalation but must not jump to roof duel
no full temple destruction, major collapse, snow transition, or roof duel

action_language_requirements: defender reaction through torso displacement, guard buckle, shoulder jolt, forced sidestep, foot skid, or recoil
tactical use of columns and railing
footwork must show traction, wet floor, slip recovery, pivot, and weight transfer
environmental response must be local and controlled
face_identity_stability_requirements: keep faces readable but not too large in frame
preserve Shuangji as female-coded with silver-blue high ponytail and blue-silver / white-blue costume language
preserve Fenshou as black-red armored male identity
camera_requirements: keep courtyard / exterior veranda / column corridor edge readable
use architectural anchors: column line, railing, wet stone floor, exterior eaves, courtyard background
camera should be medium or medium-wide
camera may track laterally along the exterior column corridor
avoid excessive shake that hides contact
avoid occlusion that hides the contact point for too long
avoid sudden teleport from veranda to roof / eaves / stairs
avoid extreme close-ups that harm face stability

environment_requirements.primary_active_environment: exterior veranda / column corridor / railing / wet stone floor

negative_constraints: no jump from veranda to roof
result_note: No-submit package only; human review required before any live submit authorization.
